name: f-mini-s
author: Sam H-C
comment: The productName is the name of the exe file
description: Mini scale First Robotics Competition FMS.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:vite && npm run build:electron
scripts.comment: Create runable external files for OS systems, Ex. exe for windows
scripts.dist:mac: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:linux: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:mac && npm run dist:win && npm run dist:linux
